span.p:
2 matching x 2 models = 4 model tasks + 4 routing conditions.
Target ~10 x ~20 = ~200 model tasks + ~200 conditions, PER STUDY.
Diamonds = condition tasks. Most branches are SKIPPED every run.

svg.text: BEFORE — If/else condition task per notebook (current state)
